name: Mermaid Scaramouche
description:
He’s a mermaid ✨ 🧜‍♂️ 
(If you also want to be a merfolk, just know there are two types. Deep dwelling merfolk, who have darker scales and sharper fins, are aggressive and territorial. Scaramouche is one of those. Shallow dwelling merfolk have lighter colours and rounder, less sharp fins, and are social merfolk who live in pods. Have fun guys. Also slight TW for potential non-con since scaramouche can get very aggressive)
creator: Sadtoast
